compiled_state.title: Add Execution Trace Requirement to Plan and Fidelity Reviewers
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context
The evaluation paradox (Research Gap 5: LLM-as-a-Judge) means LLM reviewers suffer from verbosity bias and misclassify broken output as correct. Plan/fidelity reviewers in the brainstorm and implementation-plan skills currently score dimensions without explicitly tracing execution logic. Research (EvalPlus benchmark) shows forcing execution traces drastically reduces misclassification. Deferred from the main blindspots initiative to limit scope.

## Success Criteria
- Plan reviewers (implementation-plan Step 4) include an execution trace requirement for at least one success criterion per review
- Fidelity reviewers (brainstorm scrutiny pipeline Step 4) include an execution trace requirement
- Completion verifier includes execution-based verification steps (run verify commands, not just static assessment)

## Dependencies
None (can be implemented independently)

## Approach
TBD. Needs /dso:brainstorm before implementation (placeholder epic — scrutiny skipped).
